description: Search for trending topics, keywords, and discussions across social media and the web

args.query: Topic or keywords to search trends for (OPTIONAL — omit to get global/current trends)
args.region: Region code like US, AR, GB, global (OPTIONAL — defaults to US)
args.providers: Comma-separated provider names (OPTIONAL — omit to use all). Available: google-trends,reddit,youtube,hackernews,bluesky,mastodon,twitter,tiktok

routerHints: If the user asks about what's trending, popular topics, viral content, hot discussions, or current trends — use this category. If a specific topic is mentioned ('AI trends', 'teenager trends', 'crypto'), set the 'query' arg. If no specific topic, omit 'query' entirely to get global trends. Region is optional — use 2-letter country code if user mentions a country (US, AR, GB, etc). Omit region for worldwide. Provider hints: twitter and tiktok use browser scraping (slower but cover social media), the others use fast APIs.
